metadata.title: WaveST-Gate: Xenium-to-Visium Breast Cancer Spatial Deconvolution Benchmark and Evidence
metadata.description: WaveST-Gate release package for a reproducible Xenium-to-Visium breast cancer spatial deconvolution benchmark, reliability-calibrated multimodal model evidence, baseline comparisons, ablations, boundary analysis, niche interpretation, external generalization summaries, and robustness statistics.
metadata.notes: This metadata is ready for a Zenodo deposition draft. A real DOI is only created after uploading the bundle and publishing/reserving a DOI through Zenodo.
